Summaries of evidence and advice on common health topics 
With over 370 topics to choose from, clinical knowledge summaries (CKS) can provide quick answers to clinical questions.
Making decisions about your care 
Our patient decision aids (PDAs) include treatment options available, likely outcomes, benefits, harms and uncertainties.
NHS 10 Year Plan The government's ambitious 10 Year Plan is here – and NICE is at the forefront, delivering faster, and fairer access to life-changing health innovations. With 3 game-changing priorities already in motion, patients could soon benefit from faster access to cutting-edge treatments.  10 Year Plan for the NHS In-depth Our chief executive, Dr Sam Roberts, welcomes the government's 10 Year Plan for healthcare Blogs How NICE is helping to deliver the government's 10 Year Plan for healthcare Podcasts Back to top Guidance Standards and indicators Clinical Knowledge Summaries (CKS) Clinical Knowledge Summaries Clinical Knowledge Summaries British National Formulary (BNF) British National Formulary British National Formulary BNF for Children (BNFC) British National Formulary for Children British National Formulary for Children Life sciences Library and knowledge services What NICE does Implementing NICE guidance Get involved About us Careers News, blogs and podcasts Newsletters and alerts Contact us Leave feedback
